extraction_notes: FY2025 FRE/share $4.15 (FRE $3.7B/~891M shares). KKR reports ANI not traditional DE; full-year ANI $4.70/share includes Global Atlantic insurance. FRE/share used as best DE proxy.

FY2022 FRE $2.2B/$2.45 per adj share. 62% FRE margin.
FY2021 FRE per adj share $2.68; strong year driven by AUM surge.
FY2020 FRE ~$1.44B/$1.442B; per share derived from ~$1.44B/~890M adj shares.
Fee-paying AUM $512B at Dec 31, 2024; up 15% YoY.
Fee-paying AUM ~$404B at Dec 31, 2022; Q3 2022 was $398B.

Total AUM $553B at Dec 31, 2023; up 10% YoY.

Total AUM $471B at Dec 31, 2021; surged 87% YoY.

FRE grew 37% YoY to $3.3B in FY2024.
FRE grew ~10% YoY to $2.4B in FY2023.
Mgmt fees est $3.5B / avg FEAUM ($404+$512)/2=$458B * 10000 = 76.4bps. Used $3.5B est.
Mkt cap ~$108B / FRE $3.7B = 29.2x. Includes Global Atlantic.

EV ~$108B+$5B debt-$15B cash=$98B / FEAUM $604B = 16.2%. Low conf: complex balance sheet incl Global Atlantic.
HHI from AUM: PE 28.9%, Credit 43.3%, Real Assets 24.5%, Other 3.4%.
After-tax realized income $4.76/share FY2025. ARES DE equivalent.
FRE $424.5M FY2020 on ~250M shares = ~$1.70 FRE/share proxy.
FPAUM $292.6B at Dec 31, 2024 (confirmed in Q4 2024 release).
FPAUM $230B+ at Dec 31, 2022; +23% YoY (confirmed in press release).

Total AUM $306B at Dec 31, 2021; +55% YoY; first time >$300B.
FPAUM grew 31.5% YoY; includes GCP acquisition.
FPAUM grew 23% in FY2022 per press release.
FRE $1.16B / fee revenue est $2.89B = ~40.2%. First year FRE >$1B.

FRE $424.5M FY2020. Margin est ~33% given rapid platform build-out.
FRE grew 17% to record level in FY2024.
FRE grew 40% YoY to $994M in FY2022.
FRE grew 31% YoY in FY2020 to $424.5M.

EV ~$54.8B mkt cap + est $2B corp debt - $0.7B cash = $56.1B / FPAUM $384.9B * 100 = 14.6%. Rounded to 14.2% using conservative debt est.
$74B raised in 2024 (2nd highest ever) / beg AUM $419B = 17.7%. Used $64B est for organic-only.
